introduction--docs.content:
import { Meta } from "@storybook/addon-docs/blocks";

Tenfore Golf

# Fox Design System

The component library, booking product, and multi-club theming system behind Tenfore's golf experiences — built on Untitled UI, Tailwind CSS v4, and React Aria, and documented end-to-end here in Storybook.

430+ stories  ·  8 categories  ·  3 club colorways  ·  WCAG AA

## What this is This Storybook is the single source of truth for **Tenfore Fox** — a golf club booking and commerce product — and the design system it stands on. It spans four layers: the **foundations** (design tokens), a full **component library**, the **product experiences** assembled from them, and a **theming system** that re-skins the whole thing per club. Everything below is live and interactive in the sidebar. ## The map | Category | Stories | What's inside | | --- | --- | --- | | **Foundations** | 42 | Design tokens & primitives — Colors, Typography, Spacing, Radius, Border, Effect Styles, Icons, Logos, and Golf Courses brand data. | | **Base Components** | 180 | The Untitled UI core kit — buttons, inputs, selects, checkboxes, badges, avatars, tooltips, and more. | | **Application Components** | 75 | Complex patterns — tables, modals, date pickers, pagination, tabs, navigation, and page sections. | | **Account** | 9 | Authentication flows — Log in, Sign up, Forgot password, Verification. | | **Booking** | 31 | The tee-time booking engine — Molecules (search, calendars, slot cards) and full Pages. | | **Tenfore Fox** | 10 | The flagship product — Tee Times, Pro Shop, Restaurant, Checkout, Confirmation. | | **Explorations** | 13 | Alternate concepts & integrations — GolfNow, Google, SevenRooms, and combined flows. | | **Design Systems** | 70 | Colorways, color-theory combinations, and per-club style guides (Kettle Hills, Sagamore, FloGolf). | ## The product — Tenfore Fox The **Tenfore Fox** category is the assembled product: a member books a tee time, shops the **Pro Shop**, reserves at the **Restaurant**, and completes **Checkout** to a **Confirmation**. It's the proof that the component library and booking molecules compose into a real, branded end-to-end experience. ## The booking engine **Booking** holds the reusable machinery — the search bar, date/rate calendars, tee-time slot cards, and player selectors as **Molecules**, then the full **Pages** that arrange them. These same parts power the Tenfore Fox tee-time flow and every club style guide. ## Multi-club theming & Design Systems A single helper, `clubBrandStyle(color)`, re-points the brand namespace tokens so an entire screen adopts a club's color with no per-component edits. The **Design Systems** category showcases this: - **Colorways** — the full booking style guide rendered in each hue of the utility palette. - **Color Theory** — analogous, complementary, and triadic harmonies derived from real OKLCH hue, across every chromatic base. - **Kettle Hills · Sagamore · FloGolf** — the live per-club colorways (blue, near-black, green). - **Accessibility** — every brand surface uses the `-700` shade and clears **WCAG AA (4.5:1)**; each guide badges its worst-case contrast. Start at **Design Systems → Overview** for a deeper tour of that work. ## Foundations & components **Foundations** documents the tokens everything is built from — the semantic color system (`text-primary`, `bg-brand-solid`, `fg-success-primary`, …), the type scale, spacing, radius, and the brand logos for each golf course. **Base** and **Application Components** are the Untitled UI library those tokens dress. ## How it's built - **React 19** + **TypeScript** throughout - **Tailwind CSS v4** with a semantic, light/dark-aware token system (`src/styles/theme.css`, `palette.css`) - **React Aria Components** as the accessibility foundation (imported as `Aria*`) - **Storybook 10** (`@storybook/nextjs-vite`) for documentation and visual testing ### Conventions - Files are **kebab-case**; React Aria imports are prefixed **`Aria*`**. - Style with **semantic tokens** (`text-secondary`, `bg-primary`) — never literal color classes. - Per-club accent colors live in the theming helper, not in component code. ---

Tip: use the sidebar to browse, or press / to search. Most stories have a Controls tab to tweak props live, and a Docs tab for usage.
